title: Sango lia IATF
summary: Site ya atu eswe ya International Accessibility Task Force.
problem: IATF yapwile ni usongwelo upema wa atu waze te akulumbunwina yitanga yacho, ni kulumbununa yipwo, ni kusolola waze akwasa hanga alinge yuma yipema.
why: Chihela chacho chili chihela cha IATF chize chakutwama ha chikungulwila cha atu.
scopeIn: Mapaji akutayiza atu waze akulumbununa chizavu cha IATF
Chisoneko cha atu waze akutayiza mulimo wa IATF, ni waze akuwahisa, ni yuma yize ali nayo, ni yoze wakuwahisa mulimo wacho, ni chuma chize akuyisongwela, ni yize akuyisolola
Peji ni fomu ya kukumba ha kukumba
Chisoneko cha mu Chingelezi chili ni usongwelo uze unashimbwila ha kulumbunuka
Kuhinjika ha Cloudflare Workers Static Assets
scopeOut: Yikungululo ya waze akulianga, yikungululo, hanji yitanga ya kuyiluka
Kuwahisa code ya project, yize yatwama mu repository ya project yeswe
Kuhanjikanga ha mashimbu amwenemwene, chize chinatwama mu Discord
Kutachikiza milonga ya mutu ni mutu, yize yatwama mu chitanda cha milimo yeswe ha GitHub

title: IATF selfie
summary: Chisoneko cha IATF cha shimbu lieswe, chize chafwika muze chahete ha chihela chize te akuhwima.
problem: Kuhehwojola chakulivanga cha chishina chakuzachisa chize nachisolola kanawa kulema chakutambukila mu chihela cha IATF.
why: Chijimbikilo chacho chakupwa cha atu eswe, chipwe ngwe mulimo wakulongesa te unakatuka.
scopeIn: Muvwimbimbi wakulivanga wachinoma chakuzachisa hakutohwesa mikanda

title: Chizavu cha IATF
summary: Bot ya chikungulwila cha IATF, yakufwika muze yahetele ha chihela chize te akuhwima.
why: Chijimbikilo chacho chakupwa cha atu eswe, chipwe ngwe mulimo wakulongesa te unakatuka.
scopeIn: Kuhona kulizanga ha mitango ya IATF, ni kuyitunga ngwe mikanda ya mbunga
